seasonPassCard: Spider-Man: Brand New Day (1-Cost, 2 Power, Moveable twice. After this moves to a location, give one of your other cards there +1 Power)
newKeyword: Moveable - You may move this card while playing cards (no location-adjacency restriction like the old Move keyword)
recentOTA: Mother Askani: 4/3 -> 4/4, buff now only affects the copy, not the original (nerf, July 16 OTA)
Supergiant: 4/6 -> 4/5 (nerf, July 16 OTA, reduce dominant tech-card status)
Luke Cage: 3/2 protects all cards -> 2/2 protects only front-row cards (nerf, July 16 OTA)
Spider-Man 2099: reworked from 5/9 destroy-on-first-move -> 4/5 afflicts moved enemy card with -3 Power (rework, July 16 OTA, expands Moveable package)
Moondragon: 2/2 -> 2/1 (nerf, April 16 OTA, was overperforming in a dominant deck)
Chamber: 2/2 -> 2/1, wording "higher" -> "more" (nerf, April 16 OTA, targeted the End of Turn 2099 deck)
Wolverine, Horseman of War: Objective payoff +3 -> +4 Power (buff, April 16 OTA)
Techno-Organic Virus: copy cost +2 -> +1 Cost (buff, April 16 OTA)

topArchetypes.name: Lockdown Move
topArchetypes.description: The longest-running top Move deck; doesn't rely solely on movement for its win condition, giving it outs other Move decks lack. Boosted by the season's new Moveable-keyword cards (Spider-Man: Brand New Day, Mary Jane, Aunt May, reworked Spider-Man 2099).

topArchetypes.name: Fantomex / Morgan le Fay
topArchetypes.description: Current best-win-rate disruption deck; Fantomex + Morgan le Fay combine for strong points while the 3-Cost slot stays flexible for a final turn play.

topArchetypes.name: Nimrolactus
topArchetypes.description: Shines in week 1 of a season while the ladder hasn't adjusted to respect Nimrod yet; nets a few surprise 4-8 cube wins before players learn to play around it.

newSeasonCards.name: Spider-Man: Brand New Day
newSeasonCards.note: Season Pass card. Moveable twice. After this moves to a location, give one of your other cards there +1 Power.

newSeasonCards.name: Mary Jane
newSeasonCards.note: Super Premium Pass. End of Turn: Give each of your cards that moved this turn +1 Power.

newSeasonCards.name: Aunt May
newSeasonCards.note: 2/4 (post-OTA). End of Turn card supporting the Moveable package.

newSeasonCards.name: Sinister Six
newSeasonCards.note: 12 Power. Game Start: The first 6 characters you draw are EVIL! After you play them all, merge them into this and add this to the last one's location.

newSeasonCards.name: Tombstone
newSeasonCards.note: 3 Power. On Reveal: Destroy your lowest-Power card at each other location.

newSeasonCards.name: Scorpion: Brand New Day
newSeasonCards.note: 8 Power. Ongoing: Double the Power reductions on all enemy cards.

newSeasonCards.name: Spider-Sense
newSeasonCards.note: Skill card, reduces cost based on Moveable cards played.

newSeasonCards.name: Tarantula
newSeasonCards.note: Grants power boosts when your side leads in power at the location.

newSeasonCards.name: Boomerang
newSeasonCards.note: When this returns to your hand, randomly steal 4 Power from a character in your opponent's hand.
